notes: Outfit delivers a clean, modern headline vibe while Inter maintains high body readability.
Single font family approach is ideal for minimal layouts to keep page weight and visual noise low.
Monospaced and geometric sans-serif shapes enforce the raw, engineering-focused neo-brutalist archetype.
Plus Jakarta Sans adds premium modern spacing, pairing beautifully with blur backgrounds.
Uses Inter as fallback to resemble the premium native macOS user interface aesthetic.
Bold geometric heading layouts match neon gradients and dark tech backdrops.
